footer.tagline: A premium institute dedicated to SAP Finance training and digital SAP transformation — for professionals and enterprises.
footer.disclaimer: Registration of the activity declaration does not constitute State accreditation.

home.lede: SAP Finance excellence: digital transformation, Key User enablement and certifying programs for demanding professionals.
home.positioning_title_a: Three areas of expertise, one focus:
home.positioning_lede: CBS Finance Institute is exclusively dedicated to SAP Finance. Our conviction: the performance of a project, a team or a transformation is built at the intersection of business processes, their translation into SAP and the upskilling of the people involved.
home.pillar_1_text: Deep mastery of Finance processes and their translation into SAP — for projects that are more coherent, more secure and more performant.
home.pillar_2_text: A structured support for enterprises evolving their SAP Finance, focused on adoption, alignment and operational efficiency.
home.pillar_3_text: Premium programs designed to accelerate the upskilling of professionals, experts and teams engaged in transformation programs.
home.offers_title_a: Three flagship offers to address your
home.offer_1_text: Premium trainings for SAP experts, consultants, Finance professionals and evolving profiles looking to strengthen their operational mastery.
home.offer_2_text: A structured support for enterprises engaged in SAP Finance transformation challenges — focused on adoption, alignment and performance.
home.offer_3_text: A dedicated offer to prepare key users, drive process adoption, strengthen autonomy and secure the rollout.
home.why_text: CBS Finance Institute is built on a simple conviction: only pedagogies anchored in the field, in real processes and project realities deliver true upskilling.
home.why_6: Quality and rigor as a standard
home.audience_title: Designed for demanding professionals and organizations.
home.aud_1_desc: Experts looking to strengthen their operational mastery
home.aud_2_desc: Evolving profiles and consultants in growth mode
home.aud_3_desc: Key users preparing their upskilling journey
home.aud_4_desc: Decision makers engaged in Finance transformation
home.aud_5_desc: Project actors seeking alignment and efficiency
home.aud_6_desc: Organizations restructuring their systems and processes
home.corp_title: Two flagship packs for your SAP transformations.
home.corp_lede: The SAP Digital Transformation Pack and the SAP Key User Enablement Pack structure our B2B offer for enterprises looking to strengthen alignment, adoption and upskilling around SAP Finance.
home.corp_p1_text: Support for enterprises in their SAP Finance transformation challenges — business/tool alignment and adoption of new operating standards.
home.corp_p2_text: Upskilling of business relays, process adoption, autonomy strengthening and rollout security.
home.digital_lede: Playbooks, PDF guides, templates and premium resources designed to extend upskilling and equip SAP Finance professionals on a daily basis.
home.final_title: Let's discuss your SAP Finance project.
home.final_lede: Whether you are a professional looking to deepen your expertise or a company engaged in a transformation, let's discuss your challenges and shape a tailored answer.
